---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: Suggest a new skill, agent, command, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Type / 功能类型

- [ ] New Skill / 新技能
- [ ] New Agent / 新代理
- [ ] New Command / 新命令
- [ ] Improvement to existing feature / 改进现有功能
- [ ] New project template / 新项目模板
- [ ] New runtime support / 新运行时支持
- [ ] Other / 其他

## Problem / 问题

What problem does this feature solve? Is it something you currently can't do with SuperOPC?

这个功能解决什么问题？是你目前用 SuperOPC 无法完成的事情吗？

## Proposed Solution / 建议方案

Describe the solution you'd like. For skills, describe when it should trigger and what it should output.

描述你期望的方案。如果是技能，请描述触发条件和输出内容。

## One-Person Company Value / 一人公司价值

Why is this valuable for solo founders? How does it save time or improve outcomes?

为什么这对独立创始人有价值？如何节省时间或改善结果？

## Alternatives Considered / 替代方案

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context / 补充信息

Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
